## Definisi Dasar Qubit

:::: {.columns style="display: flex; gap: 4%; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: left;"}

::: {.column width="50%"}

Istilah *Quantum Bit* berasal dari gabungan kata 
[**Quantum**]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=2} dan 
[**Bit**]{.fragment .highlight-red fragment-index=1}.

<div class="table-center">
<table class="my-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: center; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-red" data-fragment-index="1">Bit</span>
      </th>
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; background-color: #e2e8f0;"></th>
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: center; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-blue" data-fragment-index="2">Qubit</span>
      </th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="1">$$0$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$\longrightarrow$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$|0\rangle$$</div>
      </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="1">$$1$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$\longrightarrow$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$|1\rangle$$</div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
</div>

::: 

::: {.column width="50%"}

Karena Qubit bersifat
<span class="fragment highlight-blue" data-fragment-index="1"><strong>Kuantum</strong></span>,
, maka Qubit dapat mengalami
<span class="fragment highlight-red" data-fragment-index="2"><strong>Superposisi</strong></span>.
<table style="margin: 2em auto; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.8em; width: 90%; table-layout: fixed; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <!-- Judul Kolom Kiri -->
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: left; width: 40%; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-blue" data-fragment-index="1" style="font-weight: 600; display: block;">Sifat Bit</span>
      </th>
      <!-- Kolom Kosong Untuk Panah -->
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; width: 20%; background-color: #e2e8f0;"></th>
      <!-- Judul Kolom Kanan -->
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: left; width: 40%; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-red" data-fragment-index="2" style="font-weight: 600; display: block;">Sifat Qubit</span>
      </th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <!-- Isi Kolom Kiri -->
      <td style="padding: 1em 1.2em; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="1">0 atau 1</div>
      </td>
      <!-- Isi Kolom Tengah (Panah) -->
      <td style="padding: 1em 1.2em; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$\longrightarrow$$</div>
      </td>
      <!-- Isi Kolom Kanan -->
      <td style="padding: 1em 1.2em; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$|\psi\rangle = \alpha|0\rangle + \beta|1\rangle$$</div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

::: 

:::: 

---


## Representasi Standard Qubit 

:::: {.columns style="display: flex; gap: 4%; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: left;"}

::: {.column width="48%" .fragment}
**Vektor Kolom**

$$|0\rangle = \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}, \quad |1\rangle = \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}$$

$$\begin{aligned}
|\psi\rangle &= \alpha|0\rangle + \beta|1\rangle \\
             &= \alpha \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}
              + \beta \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}
              = \begin{pmatrix} \alpha \\ \beta \end{pmatrix}
\end{aligned}$$
:::

::: {.column width="48%" style="border-left: 1px solid #ffffff; padding-left: 4%;" .fragment}
**Syarat Normalisasi**

$$\langle\psi| = \begin{pmatrix} \alpha^* & \beta^* \end{pmatrix}$$

$$\begin{aligned}
\langle\psi|\psi\rangle
  &= \begin{pmatrix} \alpha^* & \beta^* \end{pmatrix}
     \begin{pmatrix} \alpha \\ \beta \end{pmatrix} = 1 \\
  &= \alpha^*\alpha + \beta^*\beta = 1 \\
  &= |\alpha|^2 + |\beta|^2 = 1
\end{aligned}$$
:::

::::

**Bentuk Fisis Bit dan Qubit**

<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem; text-align: center; align-items: flex-start;">

<div class="fragment" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;">
  <div style="width:100px; text-align:right; font-weight:bold;">
    Bit
  </div>

  <img src="gambar/2.png"
       class="img-border"
       style="width:360px; height:auto;">
</div>

<div class="fragment" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;">
  <div style="width:100px; text-align:right; font-weight:bold;">
    Qubit
  </div>

  <img src="gambar/1.png"
       class="img-border"
       style="width:360px; height:auto;">
</div>

</div>


---

### Representasi Bola Bloch

:::: {.columns style="display: flex; gap: 1%; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: left;"}

::: {.column width="48%" .fragment}
Representasi Keadaan dalam Bola Bloch
<!-- <div class="fragment" 
    style="
    background-color: #f0f7ff;
    border: 2px solid #41a6fc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    width: 800px;
    height: 180px;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 10px 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
">
$$
|\psi\rangle = \cos\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)|0\rangle +
e^{i\phi}\sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)|1\rangle
$$
</div> -->

<div style="position:relative; width:600px; height:180px;">

<div style="
position:absolute;
top:50%;
left:50%;
transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
z-index:2;
">
$$
|\psi\rangle = \cos\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)|0\rangle +
e^{i\phi}\sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)|1\rangle
$$
</div>

<div class="fragment"
style="
position:absolute;
top:0;
left:0;
width:100%;
height:100%;
border:2px solid #41a6fc;
background:#f0f7ff;
border-radius:6px;
z-index:1;
">
</div>

</div>

\begin{align}
 & 0 \le \theta \le \pi \\
 & 0 \le \phi < 2\pi \\
\end{align}
:::

::: {.column width="48%" style="text-align: center;" .fragment}
Diagram Bola Bloch

![](gambar/bloch.png){width="50%"}

<!-- <p style="font-size: 0.75em; text-align: left; margin-top: 1em; color: #aaa;">
  **Penjelasan Diagram:**
  * Kutub utara mewakili keadaan $|0\rangle$ ($\theta = 0$).
  * Kutub selatan mewakili keadaan $|1\rangle$ ($\theta = \pi$).
  * Sudut $\theta$ menentukan posisi lintang, sedangkan $\phi$ menentukan posisi bujur pada permukaan bola. Setiap titik unik pada bola merepresentasikan satu keadaan superposisi qubit yang valid.
</p> -->
:::
::::

---

## Struktur Basis Multi-Qubit (Tensor Product)

Bagaimana keadaan basis gabungan terbentuk dari ruang vektor individual:

:::: {.columns style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"}

<!-- KOLOM 1 (KIRI): Berisi Proses Perkalian DAN Semua 4 Basis Gabungan di Bawahnya -->
::: {.column width="55%" style="text-align: left;" .fragment}
**Representasi 2 Basis Gabungan**

$$|01\rangle = |0\rangle \otimes |1\rangle = \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix} \otimes \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \\ 0 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}$$

<br>

**Representasi 3 Basis Gabungan**

<div style="font-size: 0.7em;">

$$
|011\rangle = |0\rangle \otimes |1\rangle \otimes |1\rangle=
\begin{pmatrix}
0\\
0\\
0\\
1\\
0\\
0\\
0\\
0
\end{pmatrix}
$$

</div>

:::

<!-- KOLOM 2 (KANAN): Berisi Kotak Kartu Sistem 2-Qubit & 3-Qubit -->
::: {.column width="40%" style="text-align: left;"}
**Sistem 2-Qubit**

::: {.fragment .card .success-box style="padding: 1em; text-align: center; margin-top: 0.2em; margin-bottom: 0.8em;"}
$$|\psi\rangle = \sum_{i,j \in \{0,1\}} \alpha_{ij}|ij\rangle \rightarrow \sum_{i,j} |\alpha_{ij}|^2 = 1$$
:::

**Sistem 3-Qubit**

::: {.fragment .card .info-box style="padding: 1em; text-align: center; margin-top: 0.2em;"}
$$|\psi\rangle = \sum_{i,j,k \in \{0,1\}} \alpha_{ijk}|ijk\rangle \rightarrow \sum_{i,j,k} |\alpha_{ijk}|^2 = 1$$
:::
:::

::::


<!-- ## Perbedaan dengan Komputer Klasik {auto-animate=true}

Komputer harian (laptop/PC) bekerja dengan sistem digital yang menggunakan miliaran transistor. Di dalamnya, elektron bekerja secara kolektif:

::: {#computer-diff data-id="classic-vs-quantum"}
$$\text{Arus Listrik Macroscopic (Kolektif)}$$
:::

## Perbedaan dengan Komputer Klasik {auto-animate=true}

Komputer harian (laptop/PC) bekerja dengan sistem digital yang menggunakan miliaran transistor. Sedangkan komputer kuantum bekerja pada level individual:

::: {#computer-diff data-id="classic-vs-quantum"}
$$\text{Sifat Individual Elektron (Quantum Scale)}$$
:::

---

## Penerapan Spin pada Qubit {auto-animate=true}

*Spin* (gerak berputar) elektron menjadi representasi fisik dari qubit. Keadaan *spin up* dan *spin down* diwakili oleh keadaan basis:

::: {#spin-display data-id="spin-transform"}
$$|0\rangle \quad \text{dan} \quad |1\rangle$$
::: -->
